sub_strands.sub_strand: Direct vs. Indirect Rule and Armed Resistances
outcomes: Contrast the structural execution of British indirect rule against the French assimilation policy across Africa
Analyze the socio-economic impacts of settler colonialism, land alienation, and early political associations in Kenya

sub_strands.sub_strand: The World Wars and League of Nations
outcomes: Examine the underlying systemic causes and geopolitical outcomes of the First and Second World Wars
Evaluate the structural failures of the League of Nations in maintaining international collective security architectures
Analyze mechanisms of compressional, tensional, and shearing forces according to modern plate tectonics theory
Map extrusive and intrusive volcanic features and assess their direct influence on human settlements and economic activities

sub_strands.sub_strand: Statistical Data and Introduction to GIS
outcomes: Compute and interpret geographical data metrics using standard deviation, variance, and cumulative frequency graphs
Explain the foundational data structures (vector vs. raster spatial layers) of Geographic Information Systems (GIS)

strands.strand: Sovereignty of God and Covenant Systems

sub_strands.sub_strand: The Abrahamic Covenant and Sinai Mosaic Law
outcomes: Analyze the theological parameters, symbolism, and modern ethical obligations tied to the Abrahamic and Mosaic covenants
Evaluate leadership profiles of Israelite judges and early kings against modern standards of public accountability and corporate ethics
